title: Severe Groundwater Contamination in Bundelkhand Villages
why_missing: Lacks sensational visual appeal; remote rural region gets ignored by national mainstream media.
impact: Over 50 villages face chronic health issues, including fluorosis and kidney ailments.
source: Local NGO Report / Ground Reality Census

title: Decay of Traditional Handloom Sectors in Telangana
why_missing: Overshadowed by tech sector and urban growth narratives in national financial news.
impact: Thousands of weaver families face debt trap and migration due to lack of minimum support price.

title: Lack of Basic Infrastructure in Border Schools of Ladakh
why_missing: National defense and geopolitical security news dominates, ignoring local developmental deficits.
impact: Children walk up to 10km daily in sub-zero temperatures; high dropout rates in border districts.

title: Pesticide Health Crisis in Vidarbha Cotton Belt
why_missing: Mainstream coverage focuses only on general farmer debt, ignoring the specific chemical poisoning crisis.
impact: Hospitalizations of farmers due to inhalation of toxic pesticides without safety gear.

title: Threat to Sundarbans Honey Gatherers from Climate Migration
why_missing: Focus on short-term political battles in state capitals rather than long-term environmental displacement.
impact: Traditional Mouli communities losing livelihoods, leading to rising man-animal conflict.
source: West Bengal Forest Department / Climate Action India
